prose:
The frontier-orbitals task was successfully run on furan.

**Furan frontier-orbital energies and HOMO-LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: input geometry from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz`, used as-is (single-point calculation). SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings reported.

The HOMO energy is **-6.3597638 eV** and the LUMO energy is **-0.1024036 eV**. The resulting HOMO-LUMO gap is **6.2573602 eV**.

The calculation was performed using the following CLI invocation:
`/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp_7fq5ddg/live.json`

The full result JSON was written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp_7fq5ddg/live.json`. The live output log would have been announced at the start of the calculation.
